gwaspr 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

    gwaspr R Package

    gwaspr: an R package for plotting GWAS results from GAPIT package

    GAPIT: and R package for performing Genome Wide Association Studies (GWAS)

    https://github.com/jiabowang/GAPIT3

    Installation

    devtools::install_github("derekmichaelwright/gwaspr")

    Dependancies

    tidyverse, ggpubr, ggrepel, ggtext, plotly, htmlwidgets

    GWAS Tutorial

    https://dblogr.com/academic/gwas_tutorial

    © Derek Michael Wright www.dblogr.com/

    License

    Developers

    • Derek Wright
      Author, maintainer
